info.title: AstrologyPro API
info.description: BFF (Backend For Frontend) API for the AstrologyPro Next.js portal. All endpoints are Next.js Route Handlers in the `app` directory. Authentication uses Supabase cookie-based sessions. Admin endpoints additionally require an admin role check via `getAdminUser()`.

cookieAuth.name: sb-wyluvclvtvwptsvvtgkv-auth-token
cookieAuth.description: Supabase session cookie. Obtained after sign-in via Supabase Auth. Admin endpoints additionally verify an admin role via the `admin_users` table.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 9457 Problem Details error shape used across all endpoints.

detail.example: subject must be at least 5 characters.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's ID and email from the Supabase session.

get.summary: Get current user with portal roles
get.description: Returns the authenticated user enriched with their portal role flags (is_admin, is_diviner, is_community_member, etc.).
Returns whether the current session user has admin privileges.

post.description: Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification.

get.description: Returns a comprehensive finance dashboard for the authenticated diviner: revenue summary, monthly breakdown, refunds, top clients, pending payout, and projections.
Returns live KPI counts for the diviner's bookings dashboard: sessions this week, hours, upcoming count, total clients, and total revenue.
Paginated list of bookings for the authenticated diviner with optional status and date filters.
Returns affiliate campaigns owned by the authenticated diviner with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for next page (last campaign ID from previous response).

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's own support tickets, paginated. Scoped to the requester's user ID — cannot view other users' tickets.

post.description: Creates a new support ticket on behalf of the authenticated user. A DB trigger auto-populates `ticket_number`.

get.description: Returns a single support ticket with its public message thread. Object-level authorization enforced — users can only view their own tickets.

post.description: Appends a public message to the support ticket thread from the authenticated user. Only ticket owner can post.
Allows a ticket requester to submit a Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) rating after a ticket is resolved.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns all platform support tickets with filtering by status, type, priority, and assignment. Paginated.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a new ticket on behalf of a requester or as an internal job/task.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns a single ticket with ALL messages (public + internal) and the full history audit trail.

200.description: Ticket with full thread and history.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates status, priority, assignment, queue, resolution, or adds a message (internal note or public reply) in a single atomic request.

message.description: Message body — added as a ticket message.

is_internal.description: If true, message is an internal note (default true for admins).

post.description: Admin-only. Sends an email notification to the requester about their ticket.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns the platform revenue ledger with per-entry breakdowns of gross, platform fees, affiliate commissions, diviner net amounts, refunds, and settlement status. Includes latest finance operation note per entry.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by source reference, diviner display name, or username.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns all platform bookings with filtering by status, diviner, date range, and client search. Includes current-month summary stats.
Admin-only. Aggregated revenue across all diviners: summary totals, per-diviner breakdown, by-service-category, and monthly trend.
Admin-only. Booking counts, completion rates, and revenue by period.
Admin-only. User registrations, role distribution, and churn metrics.
Admin-only. Reading counts, types, and duration analytics.
Admin-only. Lists user-submitted abuse and moderation reports with optional status and date filters.
Admin-only. Lists tracked geopolitical and market entities (countries, cities, institutions, markets, commodities) with pagination and stats.

post.description: Admin-only. Adds a new geopolitical or market entity to the mundane astrology system.

get.description: Admin-only. Lists astrological forecasts for mundane entities with filters by type, entity, and publish status.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a new mundane astrology forecast.

get.description: Community-facing. Returns published mundane entities visible to authenticated community members.
Community-facing. Returns published forecasts visible to authenticated members.
Returns current astrological signal scoring for tracked entities.

post.description: Triggers AI generation of a weekly mundane astrology brief for the current period.

get.description: Returns astrological correlations and signals for tracked financial markets.
Admin-only. Lists all affiliate campaigns (platform-wide and per-diviner) enriched with affiliate counts, conversion counts, and diviner names. Uses cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a platform-wide affiliate campaign (diviner_id=NULL) or a diviner-scoped campaign.

get.description: Admin-only. Platform-wide campaign performance metrics: summary, per-diviner breakdown, top campaigns, and monthly trend.
Admin-only. Lists all platform users with search, role, and status filters.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a short-lived impersonation session for the target user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's notification inbox.

post.description: Cancels a booking. Triggers refund logic and calendar event removal.

get.description: Returns an `.ics` calendar invite for the booking.

post.description: Creates an AWS Chime SDK video meeting for a booking. Returns meeting ID and attendee join token.
Adds an attendee to an existing Chime meeting.

get.description: Returns the current status of a Chime voice (phone) session for a booking.

post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout Session for a service booking or subscription.
Receives Stripe webhook events. Validates the `Stripe-Signature` header with the webhook secret. Not authenticated via cookie.
Creates or retrieves the diviner's Stripe Connect account and returns an Account Link URL for onboarding.

get.description: Returns the diviner's Stripe Connect account status including charges_enabled and payouts_enabled.
Returns affiliate campaigns available to the authenticated social advocate.
Returns conversion and commission stats for the authenticated social advocate.
Public. Returns marketing page content (heroes, testimonials, CTAs). No authentication required.

post.description: Public. Subscribes an email address to the marketing newsletter.
Uploads a new avatar image for the authenticated user. Allowlisted MIME types only: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp. Max 5 MB.
Records a client-side analytics event for the current user.

get.description: Returns this OpenAPI 3.1 specification as JSON.
